context_for_next_testing_agent: All iteration 11 bug fixes verified: 1) Influencer registration redirects to /dashboard/influencer, 2) Influencer dashboard shows stats (CHF, views, likes, collaborations), social networks section, and collaboration status, 3) Services and Products pages have video headers with autoplay/muted/loop, 4) Job filters on homepage expanded to 4 columns (Type de contrat, Ville, Entreprise, Réinitialiser), 5) Stripe checkout APIs return 'url' and 'session_id' attributes, 6) Reviews on service detail page are centered. Valid subscription plans: standard, guest, premium, premium_mvp, opti_starter_2k, etc.
